channel.title: julia on ExampleSite
channel.description: Recent content in julia on ExampleSite

item.title: Julia in 15 Minutes
item.description: Julia is a fast and elegant programming language. In this post, we record some of its syntax, and we talk about advanced topics like types, methods and metaprogramming with real examples. We also discuss some challenges that new users face for this language. In scientific computing, researchers need to use computers to simulate large and complex systems, from interaction of molecules to modeling of climate and the universe. This is distinct from data analytics or econometrics, where one often deals with small amount of data.
